item.title: About
item.description: Hello! I’m Corey, a Postdoctoral Research Fellow at the University of British Columbia (UBC) in beautiful Vancouver. I’m based at the Biodiversity Research Centre in Prof. Patrick Keeling’s Lab where I study microbial diversity and evolution. I’m currently working with the Tula Foundation’s Hakai Institute and the Sentinels of Change initiative. I’m using settlement plates, light traps, and plankton tows to assess symbiont diversity affecting invertebrate recruitment in relation to environmental change.
